answers.question: Current parser decorator limitation
answers.answer: Current parser supports stacked decorators with simple names. Limitation: no call expressions or attribute access in decorator position.

answers.question: Type checker decorator model
answers.answer: Use Any/unknown fallback for decorator return-type inference. Precise higher-order modeling deferred.

answers.question: Special decorator handling
answers.answer: @property, @staticmethod, @classmethod special-cased with hardcoded semantics in type checker.

answers.question: PEP 614 full compliance
answers.answer: Full PEP 614 — any expression in decorator position, including @buttons[0], @f()(x).
